text.zh: 图神经网络 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Graph Neural Network is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 图神经网络把神经计算推广到包含节点、边和关系的数据。通过在图上反复传递消息，它们学习节点、边或整个结构的表示。
text.en: Graph neural networks generalized neural computation to data with nodes, edges, and relations. By repeatedly passing messages over a graph, they learned representations for nodes, edges, or whole structures.
